prompt:
Write an essay of 160-200 words based on the picture below. In your essay, you should: 1) describe the picture briefly, 2) interpret its intended meaning, and 3) give your comments.
[Picture: A young man stands at a crossroads at dusk. One signpost points to a brightly lit city skyline labelled "Instant Success"; the other points to a narrow uphill path winding toward distant mountains, labelled "Long Journey of Mastery". Below the picture: "捷径少人走，远路终见山" (Shortcuts are crowded; the long road reaches the peak).]
essay:
In the picture, a young man is standing at a crossroad when night is coming. On his left, there is a sign pointing to a bright city which says "Instant Success". On his right, there is another sign pointing to a narrow path going up to the mountain, with the words "Long Journey of Mastery". Under the picture, there are some Chinese words which mean "Shortcuts are crowded while the long road reaches the peak".

This picture tell us a truth about how to grow up. Many young people today want to become successful very quickly. They see short videos of rich CEOs and think they can do the same. However, real success often need many years of hard practice. The bright city may look attractive, but it is also full of people who give up easily.

In my opinion, we should choose the long road. Only by working hard step by step can we really master a skill and become a person with real ability. Instant success is usually fragile, but long journey make us strong. So young people should be patient.

band_description.official_text: 较好地完成试题规定的任务。较好地切题，能较详细地描述图画并解读其寓意。用较丰富的语法结构和词汇；基本准确，只有个别错误；能适当运用衔接手段。
band_description.source: 2025 考研英语一大纲 B 节 第四档 13–16 分

boundary_decision.compared_with_higher: ¶3 评论段偏单薄，缺辩证/反例（未讨论 instant success 中合理的部分，如创业者的时代机遇）；衔接手段偏向 However/So 模板化；无高阶句式如倒装、独立主格
boundary_decision.compared_with_lower: 三要点齐全且各段展开充分；有复合句（`Only by... can we`）和现在分词（`going up to the mountain`）；语言错误密度低（3 处主谓一致）

intra_band_adjustment.reason: 档内取中高位 14——三要点完整度好于第四档下限，但语言精度和衔接多样性均未达第四档高位

dimension_diagnosis.task_completion: 三要点齐全：描述（¶1，含中文说明翻译）+ 寓意（¶2，快慢成功对比）+ 评论（¶3，主张选长路）；但寓意段论证略浅，停留于『真实成功需要年月』而未深挖
dimension_diagnosis.grammar_lexis: 较丰富：Only by... can we（倒装）+ 现在分词状语（pointing / going up）+ but/however/so 衔接；词汇 fragile / patient / attractive 处于 mid tier
dimension_diagnosis.accuracy: 3 处主谓一致（tell / need / make）较明显但可理解，不影响整体阅读
dimension_diagnosis.cohesion: However / But / So / In my opinion 衔接多样但偏模板；段间过渡平顺，未见跨段呼应

suggestion: pursuing mastery in a measured manner

vocabulary_upgrades.note: 口语短语 → 学术表达

issues.original: This picture tell us a truth
issues.suggestion: This picture tells us a truth

issues.original: real success often need many years
issues.suggestion: real success often requires/needs many years
issues.reason: 主谓一致：success 为不可数，third person singular

issues.suggestion: a long journey makes us strong
issues.reason: 主谓一致 + 冠词缺失

issues.original: at a crossroad when night is coming
issues.reason: crossroads 本身是复数形式固定搭配；`at dusk` 更地道

issues.original: Instant success is usually fragile, but long journey make us strong
issues.suggestion: ¶3 可加 1 句反面论证，如：`Of course, not every bright path is a trap — timing and opportunity matter — but even so, depth-building beats speed-chasing in the long run.`
issues.reason: 辩证维度不足，评论段仅一面之词

actions: 修复 3 处主谓一致：tell→tells / need→needs / make→makes
¶3 加 1 句反面论证，形成辩证结构（当前论证一面倒）
跨段呼应：¶3 开头加 `Returning to the dusk crossroads,...`
引入 1 个高阶句式：如独立主格 `With shortcuts crowded by impatient feet, the long road awaits those willing to...`
词汇升档：见 vocabulary_upgrades（重点替换 very quickly / hard practice / real ability）

rationale_trace.claim: 定在第四档 13-16 分区间
evidence: 较丰富语法（含倒装 + 现在分词）
语言错误 3 处但不影响理解
三要点完整度显著优于第四档下限（13）
但衔接多样性、语言精度均未达高位（16）
¶3 评论段单向论证，缺辩证维度
衔接手法偏模板 However/So，未见跨段呼应
无足够的 academic tier 词汇
rationale_trace.rubric_ref: postgrad-official-rubric.md §英一B·第五档 vs 第四档

evidence: 三要点齐全且各段展开充分——远超第三档'基本完成'
现在分词 + 倒装已超出'简单衔接'范畴
rationale_trace.rubric_ref: postgrad-official-rubric.md §英一B·第四档 vs 第三档

rationale_trace.claim: 识别 5 个低阶词可升档
evidence: very quickly / hard practice / real ability / give up easily / working hard step by step
